summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.model; public class ModelChangeEvent { public enum Type { SET, ADD, REMOVE } private final Type type; private final Object newValue; private final Object oldValue; private final String propertyName; public ModelChangeEvent(Type type, String propertyName, Object oldValue, Object newValue) { this.type = type; this.propertyName = propertyName; this.oldValue = oldValue; this.newValue = newValue; } public Type getType() { return type; } public Object getNewValue() { return newValue;
